name: product_showcase_video_10s
description: Transform a product image into a 10-second premium showcase video using Kling 3.0 image-to-video. Extended duration for detailed product presentations, ads, and social media content. Pro quality mode.

image_url.description: Product image URL (required — the image to animate)

prompt.description: Optional styling direction (e.g. 'orbit around product with dramatic lighting', 'slow zoom with luxury feel')
